summary: Replayed ADR 0267 from the refreshed exact-main tip `a01ea4ec61152d48cccdb74fdd3267a5fcfa3fe7` at repository version `0.177.103` and platform version `0.130.69`, reran the authoritative Windmill converge on `docker-runtime-lv3` with the `postgres-lv3` and `proxmox_florin` prerequisites, and re-verified the governed waiver summary, verification-script integrity mirror, and current host/runtime state on the live platform. This exact-main replay supersedes the earlier `f20b44a` proof and justifies the final protected merge bump to repository version `0.177.104` plus platform version `0.130.70`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_gate_bypass_waivers.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_release_manager.py tests/test_stage_smoke_suites.py tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_post_verify_tasks.py -q` passed with `100 passed in 6.54s`, `make syntax-check-windmill` passed, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models` passed, and `git diff --check` passed on the refreshed exact-main branch.

`make converge-windmill` succeeded from committed source `55280f371074a2f14805b6fc303b5950c95121d2` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=304 changed=53 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=52`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=68 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=20`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`.

verification.check: Governed waiver summary live on the refreshed main tip
verification.observed: `make gate-status` completed after the replay and reported `Waiver summary: 0 open, 63 legacy, 0 warnings, 0 release blockers`, confirming the structured waiver catalog and summary path are live on the current platform state.

verification.check: Release readiness view recognizes only ws-0267 pending merge
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/release_manager.py status --timeout 0` completed successfully and reported repository version `0.177.103`, platform version `0.130.69`, zero open waiver blockers, and the sole blocking workstream `ws-0267-live-apply`.

A fresh host and runtime probe confirmed hostname `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base`, kernel `6.17.13-2-pve`, active `pveproxy` and `tailscaled`, listeners on `0.0.0.0:2222`, `100.64.0.1%tailscale0:8005`, and `*:8006`, `sudo qm status 120` returning `status: running`, and Windmill answering `CE v1.662.0`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models`, `git diff --check`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` all passed after the branch-local receipt and workstream metadata were recorded.

notes: This branch-local exact-main replay preserves the worker-checkout integrity-file mirror repair, the repo-root Docker publication helper lookup, and the transient apt-lock tolerance added during the latest-main refresh cycle.

Protected integration files intentionally remain reserved for the final merge-to-main step on this branch: `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, `RELEASE.md`, `docs/release-notes/`, and `build/platform-manifest.json`.
If `origin/main` moves again before merge, recreate the worktree from the new tip and rerun `make converge-windmill` before cutting the protected mainline release surfaces.
